description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named PlatformIO CI that runs on every push to the master branch and on pull requests to master. The workflow should have two jobs: precompile on ubuntu-latest and build on a self-hosted runner. The precompile job should install dependencies, install platformio, check out the repository, and then check and run the project with platformio. The build job should check out the repository, update platformio, and compile the project for ttgo-lora32-v1 after the precompile job completes.
